title: Fertility Clinic: Best IVF Centre/Hospital in India | Seeds IVF Fertility
heading: BEGIN YOUR FERTILITY JOURNEY TODAY.
description: Seeds Of Innocens IVF is a leading fertility clinic in India offering advanced IVF, IUI, and test tube baby treatments for male and female infertility. Book now!
text: Fertility Clinic: Best IVF Centre/Hospital in India | Seeds IVF Fertility info@seedsofinnocence.com +91 98103 50512 Dr. Gauri Agarwal info@seedsofinnocence.com 9810350 512 Dr. Gauri Agarwal info@seedsofinnocence.com | 9810350 512 Dr. Gauri Agarwal Infertility Treatment Fertility Treatments IVF Procedures & Preservation Male Infertility Treatments Male Fertility Conditions Genetic Testing & Screening Maternal–Fetal Medicine (MFM) Surgeries Reproductive Health Conditions Fertility Wellness IVF Centres India International International Patients Patient Concierge Travel Support International Pricing Contact Team Resources IVF Process / Patient Journey FAQs Patient Testimonial Videos Fertility Calculator Blogs About us Our Story Leadership Team Vision, Mission & Values Success Rates Our Embryology Lab & Technology Media & Press Awards & Accreditations Doctors All IVF Specialists Maternal–Fetal Medicine Specialists Surgeon Panel Contact us Book Appointment Online Payment WhatsApp Call Back Form Centre Locator Careers Feedback Book a Visit Previous Next BEGIN YOUR FERTILITY JOURNEY TODAY. Female fertility care START NOW → Male fertility care START NOW → Couples genetic testing START NOW → Fertility Academy START NOW → Outstanding Success Rates 21000+ SUCCESS STORIES AND THE JOURNEY CONTINUES. 21000+ Healthy Babies, Countless Smiles 35+ IVF Centres Spreading Parenthood Joy 78% Success Rate Bringing Hope to Families 30+ Dedicated Fertility Specialists WHY CHOOSE US? Seeds of Innocens IVF has always been the encouraged choice Founded in 2015 by the second generation of the promoter family, Dr. Gauri Agarwal and Dr. Rajat Arora Seeds of Innocens is India's best IVF centre Grown to over 35 centres across 8 states Expanded overseas to Oman, Muscat, and Zambia Only lab in North India that has collaborated with the Department of Reproductive Sciences, University of Gent, Belgium, for the exchange of best practices and technology in infertility CALL US VISION AND MISSION ™ At Seeds of Innocens IVF, we believe in fulfilling the dreams of couples who are facing difficulty in conceiving. We believe in a future where advancements in medicine are delivered with a human touch, an end to infertility becoming less of an end and more of a beginning. Our vision is to bring happiness to everyone BOOK AN APPOINTMENT WHY CHOOSE US? We believe in a future where advancements in medicine are delivered with a human touch, an end to infertility becoming less of an end and more of a beginning. Our vision is to bring happiness to everyone BOOK AN APPOINTMENT OUR SERVICES IUI, IVF & ICSI Genetic testing (PGT-A & PGT-M) Blastocyst Transfer Cryopreservation (Egg, Sperm & Embryos) PRP & Ovarian Rejuvenation In-Vitro Fertilization (IVF) Overview In-Vitro Fertilization (IVF) is a method that helps couples with fertility related problems and in conceiving a child. During the IVF treatment, the mature eggs are retrieved from the ovaries of women and sperms from the partner which are further fertilized in the laboratory to make embryos. After a few days, these embryos are transferred into the uterus of the woman. During the IVF treatment, the mature eggs are retrieved from the ovaries of women and sperms from the partner which are further fertilized in the laboratory to make embryos. After a few days, these embryos are transferred into the uterus of the woman. Learn More LATEST BLOGS How long does semen stay in a woman? OUR EXPERTS ARE HAPPY TO GUIDE YOU. Female Frequently Asked Questions Details on ovarian function, egg retrieval, reproductive health, and treatment planning. Explore Now Male Frequently Asked Questions Insights into male reproductive health, semen analysis, diagnostic tests, and care. Explore Now Genetic Frequently Asked Questions Information on genetic screening, inherited conditions, embryo testing, and risk assessment.
